description: Create observability configuration: Grafana dashboards, Prometheus scrape configs + alert rules, OpenTelemetry collector config. Plus production configs: .env.example files, updated SECURITY.md, infra scripts, and ArgoCD manifests.
steps: Create infra/grafana/dashboards/overview.json - Main platform dashboard showing request rates, error rates, latency percentiles across all services.
Create infra/grafana/dashboards/service-detail.json - Template dashboard for individual service deep-dive (CPU, memory, GC, connection pools).
Create infra/grafana/dashboards/websocket.json - WebSocket gateway specific dashboard (connections, message rates, backpressure).
Create infra/prometheus/prometheus.yml - Scrape configs for all services, ServiceMonitor discovery, global settings.
Create infra/prometheus/alerts/platform.yml - Alert rules: high error rate, high latency P99, pod restarts, disk usage, certificate expiry.
Create infra/prometheus/alerts/business.yml - Business alert rules: signup failures, payment failures, AI cost anomalies.
Create infra/otel/otel-collector.yml - OpenTelemetry collector config with receivers (OTLP), processors (batch, memory_limiter), exporters (prometheus, jaeger, cloudwatch).
Create .env.example files for each service under services/ directory listing all required and optional env vars with descriptions.
Update SECURITY.md with comprehensive vulnerability reporting process, security scanning details, compliance info, and incident response.
Create infra/scripts/db-migrate.sh - Database migration script that runs Prisma migrations with proper error handling and rollback.
Create infra/scripts/db-backup.sh - Database backup script using pg_dump with compression, S3 upload, retention policy.
Create infra/scripts/health-check.sh - Health check script that validates all services are responding.
Create infra/argocd/application.yaml - ArgoCD Application manifests for GitOps deployment of the platform.
Create infra/argocd/project.yaml - ArgoCD AppProject with RBAC and allowed destinations.
acceptance_criteria: Grafana dashboards are valid JSON with panels, targets, and datasource references
Prometheus config has proper scrape_configs for all services
Alert rules use proper PromQL with for/labels/annotations
OpenTelemetry collector config has receivers, processors, exporters, and service pipelines
.env.example files list all env vars from backend/app.ts getConfig() for each service
SECURITY.md is comprehensive with vuln reporting, scanning, incident response
Shell scripts are executable with proper error handling (set -euo pipefail)
ArgoCD manifests have proper apiVersion and spec for Application and AppProject
verification: Verify JSON dashboards are valid JSON
Verify YAML configs are valid YAML
Run pnpm turbo build to ensure no existing code was broken
findings: Prettier auto-formatted the JSON and YAML files via lint-staged pre-commit hook. Full turbo build timed out (>180s) but no source code was modified so no risk to existing builds. All JSON dashboards validated. All YAML configs validated with js-yaml. Shell scripts made executable.
